metaTitle: Outsourced Finance for CPG Brands | Satinwood Talent
metaDescription: Outsourced finance for CPG and consumer brands. A senior operator who understands trade spend, retailer deductions, and margin by SKU, embedded full-time.
serviceName: Outsourced Finance for CPG and Consumer Brands
serviceType: Outsourced finance and accounting for consumer brands

hero.lede: Outsourced finance for CPG brands means a senior operator who understands the economics that actually run a consumer business, trade spend, retailer deductions, landed cost, and margin by SKU, embedded full-time in your business. Satinwood Talent places finance built for consumer and ecommerce brands, at the seniority of a local hire and a fraction of the cost.
hero.credLine: Built for consumer brands across the US and Canada

atAGlance.v: A fraction of a local hire

work.title: What we handle for consumer brands.
work.lede: Consumer brands have economics a generalist accountant misses. A Satinwood Talent operator owns the following, inside your own tools.

items.title: Margin and landed cost by SKU
items.body: Builds COGS and landed cost by SKU, including freight, duties, and components, so you see real margin by product, not a blended average.

items.title: Retailer and distributor deductions
items.body: Reconciles retailer and distributor settlements and tracks deductions and chargebacks to the dollar, so margin stops leaking quietly.

items.title: Trade spend and promotions
items.body: Tracks trade spend and promotional allowances against the lift they actually drive, so you know the true margin on every program.

items.title: Inventory and COGS
items.body: Owns inventory accounting and COGS so the books reflect what is really on the shelf and in transit.

items.title: Channel reconciliation
items.body: Reconciles Amazon, Shopify, and retail channels to the bank, including fees, returns, and settlements, so every channel ties out.

items.title: Cash flow through the cycle
items.body: Tracks the cash tied up in inventory and the buying cycle, so you can plan production without running dry.

why.title: Finance from people who have run a consumer brand.

items.title: Built by operators
items.body: The people behind Satinwood Talent run a consumer brand sold in thousands of stores across North America. We have closed the books, fought the deductions, and modeled the margin ourselves.

items.title: Speaks retail and ecommerce
items.body: Deductions, trade spend, landed cost, Amazon and Shopify. We know the economics that run a consumer business, not just generic accounting.

items.title: Senior and embedded
items.body: Controller and FP&A level talent, full-time and dedicated to your brand, inside your own tools and team.

items.title: A fraction of the cost
items.body: Senior finance on a consumer brand's budget, because the talent sits in a lower-cost market, not because the work is junior.

rows.label: Relative cost
rows.sat: A fraction of a local hire

whoFor.title: Built for the brands that live on margin.

items.title: Scaling into retail
items.body: You are moving from DTC into retail and the deductions, chargebacks, and trade spend are getting away from you.

items.title: Amazon and Shopify brands
items.body: Your channels do not tie out to the bank and you cannot see true margin after fees, returns, and ad spend.

items.title: Food, beverage, and CPG
items.body: Landed cost, shelf life, and inventory make your numbers harder than a typical services business.

items.title: Founders flying on gut
items.body: The brand is growing but you are guessing at margin by SKU and cash through the buying cycle.

items.q: What is outsourced finance for CPG brands?
items.a: Outsourced finance for CPG and consumer brands is a senior finance operator who understands the economics that run a consumer business, trade spend, retailer deductions, landed cost, and margin by SKU, embedded full-time in your business. Satinwood Talent places finance built for consumer and ecommerce brands, at the seniority of a local hire and a fraction of the cost.

items.q: Do you understand retailer and distributor deductions and chargebacks?
items.a: Yes. Deductions, chargebacks, and short-pays are where consumer-brand margin quietly leaks. Satinwood Talent operators reconcile retailer and distributor settlements, track deductions to the dollar, and flag what should be disputed.

items.q: Can you handle trade spend and promotions?
items.a: Yes. We track trade spend and promotional allowances against the lift they actually drive, so you know the true margin on every program, not just gross sales.

items.q: Do you track margin and landed cost by SKU?
items.a: Yes. We build COGS and landed cost by SKU, including freight, duties, and components, so you see real margin by product and channel, not a blended average.

items.q: Do you reconcile Amazon, Shopify, and retail channels?
items.a: Yes. We reconcile Amazon, Shopify, and retail or distributor channels to the bank, including fees, returns, and settlements, so every channel ties out.

items.q: Do you understand inventory and cash flow for a product business?
items.a: Yes. Inventory ties up cash, and consumer brands live and die on the cycle. We track inventory, COGS, and the cash flow through your buying cycle so you can plan production without running dry.

items.q: Who is behind Satinwood Talent's CPG finance?
items.a: The people behind Satinwood Talent run a consumer brand sold in thousands of stores across North America. We have closed the books, fought the deductions, and modeled the margin ourselves. This is finance from operators who have done it, not theory.

Controller and FP&A level. Operators are CA Sri Lanka, ACCA, CIMA, or CFA qualified, with real ownership experience inside global firms, Big Four, and listed groups. The average senior operator on our bench has 15 or more years of experience.

items.q: Is the operator dedicated and full-time, or shared?
items.a: Dedicated, full-time, and exclusive to your brand, embedded in your tools and team. Not a shared pool, not a pooled task queue, not a marketplace match.

items.q: Do you work with US and Canadian brands?
items.a: Yes. Satinwood Talent serves growing brands across the United States and Canada, as well as the United Kingdom, the United Arab Emirates, and Australia. Operators work hours that overlap your day.

items.q: How fast can you place someone, and is there a trial?
items.a: About two weeks from the first call to a hand-selected senior match. Every match starts on a trial to confirm fit, and if it is not right we replace it. Terms are flexible and rolling, with no long lock-in.
